qualifications.name: Bachelor in Education: Foundation Phase Teaching
notes: APS score: 32.

NCV requirements: NCV Level 4 issued by the Council for General and Further Education and Training; At least 60% in three fundamental subjects, including the language of learning and teaching; English at NQF Level 4; Mathematics at NQF Level 4 OR Mathematical Literacy with at least 70%; Life Orientation at NQF Level 4; At least 70% in four vocational subjects; Vocational subjects should include an additional language other than the language of learning and teaching, either Afrikaans or IsiXhosa; At least two vocational subjects should relate to the elective offerings of the Teacher Education programme.

Faculty notes: Due to limited spaces, admission is not guaranteed; Selection is based on Grade 11 final results for provisional acceptance; Full unconditional acceptance is based on final NSC and school-leaving results; Applicants who meet the minimum criteria may still go through further selection, including academic results, admission examinations, interviews, or a confidential report from a school principal.

Postgraduate study options: BEd Honours in Teaching and Learning; BEd Honours in Educational Management and Leadership; Advanced Diploma in Technical and Vocational Teaching; Magister Educationis; Doctor Educationis.
Language of instruction: {'mowbray_campus': 'English', 'wellington_campus': 'Afrikaans'}.

qualifications.name: Bachelor in Education: Senior Phase and Further Education and Training Teaching
notes: APS score: 32.

Additional requirements: Students choosing Mathematics, Accounting, Physical Science or Life Sciences as electives must have at least 50% in the relevant NSC subject; Students choosing Mathematical Literacy as an elective must have at least 60%.

Faculty notes: Due to limited spaces, admission is not guaranteed; Selection is based on Grade 11 final results for provisional acceptance; Full unconditional acceptance is based on final NSC and school-leaving results; Applicants who meet the minimum criteria may still go through further selection, including academic results, admission examinations, interviews, or a confidential report from a school principal.

Postgraduate study options: BEd Honours in Teaching and Learning; BEd Honours in Educational Management and Leadership; Advanced Diploma in Technical and Vocational Teaching; Magister Educationis; Doctor Educationis.

qualifications.name: Diploma in Grade R Teaching
notes: Additional requirements: Applicants with ECD Level 4 and/or Level 5 without Matric and experience in Grade R teaching may apply; Applicants must provide evidence that they are working in a Grade R classroom at a registered WCED ECD centre or school.

Faculty notes: Due to limited spaces, admission is not guaranteed; Selection is based on Grade 11 final results for provisional acceptance; Full unconditional acceptance is based on final NSC and school-leaving results; Applicants who meet the minimum criteria may still go through further selection, including academic results, admission examinations, interviews, or a confidential report from a school principal.

Postgraduate study options: BEd Honours in Teaching and Learning; BEd Honours in Educational Management and Leadership; Advanced Diploma in Technical and Vocational Teaching; Magister Educationis; Doctor Educationis.
Language of instruction: {'mowbray_campus': 'English', 'wellington_campus': 'Afrikaans'}.

qualifications.name: Diploma in Early Childhood Development Care and Education
notes: Additional requirements: Applicants with ECD Level 4 and/or Level 5 without Matric may apply; Applicants must provide evidence that they are working in an Early Childhood environment or classroom at a registered WCED ECD centre; Language and computer proficiency will be tested before entry; Additional support will be provided to improve proficiency during the period of study.

Faculty notes: Due to limited spaces, admission is not guaranteed; Selection is based on Grade 11 final results for provisional acceptance; Full unconditional acceptance is based on final NSC and school-leaving results; Applicants who meet the minimum criteria may still go through further selection, including academic results, admission examinations, interviews, or a confidential report from a school principal.

Postgraduate study options: BEd Honours in Teaching and Learning; BEd Honours in Educational Management and Leadership; Advanced Diploma in Technical and Vocational Teaching; Magister Educationis; Doctor Educationis.
Language of instruction: {'mowbray_campus': 'English', 'wellington_campus': 'Afrikaans'}.
